rows.label: qev086303_MSG0001
rows.name:
At last, we have arrived
at the creature's lair.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086303_MSG0004
rows.name:
Lin-san! Don't stop in
middle of path! Tatsu bump—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086303_MSG0006
rows.name: Looks like it's noticed us, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086303_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm not sure whether or not we
count as impure in your book...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086303_MSG0008
rows.name:
But we'll see about which
of us does the culling![ST:wait ]
